steps.title: Set the two y-values equal
steps.content:
At the solution, both equations have the same $x$ and the same $y$.
$$-\frac{1}{8}x=\frac{1}{10}x$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side.
$$-\frac{1}{8}x-\frac{1}{10}x=0$$
$$-\frac{9}{40}x=0$$
$$x=0$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two lines shows that they intersect at the origin, so the requested $x$-coordinate is $0$. The answer is B.
